allow: Bash(python3 scripts/wiki_tool.py log --title "Ingest: Hemingway-2017cg \(Congo River biomarkers and radiocarbon\)" --details "Created two new concept notes: GDGTBiomarkers documenting branched and isoprenoid GDGT proxies and applications to riverine source partitioning, and RadiocarbonOrganicMatter covering Δ14C as tracer of pre-aged vs modern organic matter. Updated LocalVsDistalBiomarkerSignals to add Hemingway-2017cg as source and link to new concepts. Updated PlantWaxBiomarkers with links to GDGT and radiocarbon concepts. Paper integrates plant-wax lipids, GDGT biomarkers, and radiocarbon as complementary tracers for Congo River POM sources and discharge-driven temporal variability.")
Bash(git commit -m 'Log ingestion: Hemingway-2017cg Congo River biomarkers *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Clean up and improve main body text of source files *)
